description: Ten canned confused-student lines. A's echo mode streams these; D auditions ElevenLabs voices against them.
replies: wait, hold on — it speeds up every time? like, forever?
hmm, okay... but what actually happens when a packet just disappears?
can you give me an example? like with actual numbers?
I think I followed the first part but you lost me at the threshold thing.
why though? like why not just send everything at once?
so is the window a real thing or is it just... a number the sender makes up?
wait — you said it halves? when did halving come in?
okay pretend I'm the server. what do I actually see happening?
that sounds like the same thing you said before but with different words?
huh. and that works even when two computers are doing it at the same time?
